Autonomous Agents — SAP Joule AI Agent Framework
Purpose-built Joule Agents coordinating MOT operations across 47+ infrastructure projects & multi-ministry workflows

Active Agents

▲ 24/7 Running
Actions Executed
68,611
▲ This Quarter
Avg Success Rate
98.7%
▲ Autonomous
SAR Savings Found
1.2B
▲ Annually
Agent Running...
Orchestrating 47 projects
Project & Program Delivery Agent
▲ 30% faster project delivery
Orchestrates MOT mega-project execution across 47+ active infrastructure projects with real-time SAP S/4HANA PS integration and cross-ministry coordination.
  • Monitors project milestones in S/4HANA PS module in real time
  • Auto-escalates delays to MOT Deputy Minister with impact analysis
  • Coordinates cross-ministry land acquisition with MOMRA & MISA
  • Tracks budget utilization and flags SAR 100M+ over-run risks
  • Generates weekly board reports with predictive completion forecasts
Agent Running...
Scanning road network
Road Safety Enforcement Agent
▲ 55% reduction in repeat violations
Real-time traffic law enforcement intelligence across KSA road network integrating Tahkoom camera feeds with MOI Absher ID verification.
  • Integrates Tahkoom camera feeds with MOI Absher ID verification
  • Auto-generates violation notices with full chain-of-custody audit trail
  • Identifies repeat offenders and flags high-risk driver profiles
  • Recommends policy changes to MOT based on pattern analysis
  • Syncs fines collection status with SAMA payment gateway
Agent Running...
Optimizing freight corridors
National Freight & Logistics Agent
▲ 42% cargo throughput increase
End-to-end freight flow optimization across KSA ports, borders and roads — monitoring 12,000+ daily heavy vehicle permits at all border crossings.
  • Monitors 12,000+ daily heavy vehicle permits at all crossings
  • Coordinates with ZATCA for customs clearance bottleneck prediction
  • Optimizes freight corridors with Saudi Ports Authority data fusion
  • Detects overloading patterns and triggers Tahkoom mobile units
  • Produces Vision 2030 logistics KPI dashboards for MOT leadership
Agent Running...
Analyzing SAR 48B budget
Budget & Procurement Intelligence Agent
▲ SAR 1.2B savings identified annually
AI-powered spend management across MOT's SAR 48B annual budget with continuous compliance monitoring and vendor performance scoring.
  • Continuous spend analysis against approved MOT budget envelopes
  • Vendor performance scoring via SAP Ariba & SRM integration
  • Auto-flags procurement deviations to National Procurement Center
  • GAZT & ZATCA tax compliance cross-reference on all contracts
  • Recommends reallocation using SAC predictive spend models
